Description: Project-centric ERP on Zoho Creator. Everything tags to Project. 7 phases, 12 weeks.
Foundation data. Weeks 1-2. Items, Suppliers, Customers, Stores, Users, Approval Matrix.
Central item catalog. 6 Categories (RM/Packaging/Tools/Maintenance/Capital/Admin). UOM: Nos/Kg/Ltr/Mtr/Kit. HSN, GST%, Min/Max stock.
Flooring system codes: EP01/EP02 (Epoxy), PU (PU), DEM (Demarcation), NUM/ARR/ANTI/ESD/FIL/COV.
Material consumption per system. Header + N line items (Code/Name/UOM/Qty/Waste%/Total Qty formula).
16 fields: GSTIN, PAN, Bank, Payment Terms, Credit Days. Referenced by PO/GRN/Rate Comparison.
Client org + site details. Referenced by SO and Project.
6 warehouses: Wadki/Main/Neelo/Gurgaon/Bangalore/Client Site. Rack/Shelf/Bin mapping.
8 departments. Roles: Entry/Review/Approve/Admin.
PR/PO limits per dept. 3-level approver escalation. Doc types: PR/PO/GRN/MR.
Bidirectional Item Code<->Name. AutoFetch UOM/HSN/GST%/Lead Time/Stock.
CENTRAL PHASE: Build Project form + Sales Order. Project is the hub for ALL downstream modules. Weeks 3-4.
Project ID (PRJ-YYYY-XXXX). Name/Address/Manager. Execution Base (Area/Day). Start/End Dates. Cost. Systems subtable. Status.
Budget + Dispatch subform (From/To/Charges, multiple dispatches). Always visible.
Conditional: Area Basis. Subtasks A-D (Name/Area/Cost/MP). Grinding/Primer/Screed/TopCoat/Yellow/Arrow/Numbering.
Conditional: Day Basis. Manpower Budget + Count.
Tools Budget + Overhead Budget. Always visible.
Client details. System subtable (Code/Thickness/Area/UOM/Rate/Amount formula). Total. Warranty. Commission (checkbox+%/Fix).
Material sales mode. FG subtable (Name/Qty/UOM/Rate/Amount). Billing/Shipping Address.
CRITICAL: When SO stage = Confirmed/Accepted, auto-create Project record with SO reference. Project ID linked back to SO.
PR -> Rate Comparison -> PO -> GRN -> QC. Every form carries Project ID lookup. Weeks 5-6.
Header: PR No/Date, Project ID (lookup), Dept (from login). N line items with bidirectional autofetch. Status workflow.
PR ref -> Product No/Name auto. 5 supplier comparisons (dropdown + Price + Credit). Finalise/PO link. Project ID inherited from PR.
RM Type (Coding/Non-Coding) -> RM vs RMWAD prefix. Project ID lookup. N line items with GST split (CGST/SGST/IGST). Transport scope. Printable T&C.
CRITICAL: RM prefix for Non-Coding. RMWAD prefix for Coding. Different series per category.
PO ref -> Items auto. Warehouse dropdown (conditional Client Site). Partial GRN via checkbox. Transport subform (conditional). Project ID inherited. Stock on posting.
GRN ref -> Items/Supllier auto. Test results (Viscosity/Density/Color/Moisture). Accepted/Rejected Qty. QC Status.
MR -> MIS -> FGHM -> FGAN. Every form carries Project ID. Weeks 7-8.
MR No/Date auto. Project ID (lookup). Priority. N line items with stock availability check.
MR ref -> Items auto. Issued Qty vs Required. Balance Qty formula. Stock deducted. Project ID inherited.
Project ID lookup -> Client auto. Batch No. N FG items with QC Status. Pop-up notification to Store on submit.
Opened from notification. FGH ref -> Items auto. Damaged Qty, Accepted Qty formula. Approval required. Acceptance No after approval.
Material Return (MIS ref). Inter-Store Handover. Vehicle & Transport tracking.
Production Planning -> BOM -> BMR -> RM Consumption -> Packing -> Rework. Week 9. All tagged to Project.
Project ID lookup. Period (Week/Month). Plant. SO/WO Qty auto. FG Stock auto. Net Requirement formula.
Prod Order No autogen. Project ID lookup. System Code. Planned Qty/Dates. BMR with Raw Materials subform + Process Parameters + Yield + QC.
RM Consumption (BMR ref). Packing Entry (FG packing). Rework Register (reason/ref/qty/QC).
4 departmental dashboards + 30+ reports. Weeks 10-11.
5 widgets + 6 notifications. Reports: Open PO Register, PO vs GRN, Vendor Performance, Price Comparison, Transport.
Inventory Dashboard, Dispatch Planning. 8 entry form shortcuts. 3 notification widgets.
9 widgets. 9 reports: Daily Production, BMR, Order Status, Material Consumption, Loss, Handover, Packing, Machine Utilization.
15 reports: Sitewise Costing, Manpower/Machinery/Tools, Material/Manpower vs Work Completion, Margin, Task Report.
End-to-end testing, training, deployment. Week 12.
Verify all Project ID lookups + item/supplier autofetch relationships across ALL forms.
SO->Project auto-create. PR/Pending Approval. FGHM pop-up. GRN posting -> stock. MIS -> stock deduct. FGAN -> FG stock.
Full flow: SO Accepted -> Project Created -> PR (N items, tagged to Project) -> Rate Comparison -> PO (both RM types, tagged to Project) -> GRN (partial+full) -> QC -> Stock Update
Full flow: MR (N items, tagged to Project) -> MIS (with shortage) -> FGHM -> Notification -> FGAN (with damage) -> FG Stock Update
Full flow: Production Planning (tagged to Project) -> Prod Order -> BMR -> RM Consumption -> Packing -> FGHM
GRN transport/Client Site. Project Area/Day tasks. SO Commission.
RM vs RMWAD prefix. GST split (CGST/SGST/IGST). Total in words. T&C display.
Create/Edit/View per role per form. Verify Project ID is read-only on inherited forms for non-admin users.
All departments test. Bug fixes.
User guides per department. Hands-on training sessions.
Data migration, activate all forms, go-live. Post-launch support.
